first_patient_message: I would like to schedule an appointment
goal: Schedule or reschedule to the earliest available appointment on a monday.
scenario_instructions: Schedule the first appointment to the earliest available Friday appointment after noon.
If the agent offers an appointment day or time, compare it against the clinic profile office hours.
If the offered time appears outside office hours, politely ask the agent to confirm.
After the appointment is confirmed, ask if there is anything the patient needs to do or bring to prepare.
